content: Folders larger than this size won't be uploaded.

comment.text: This is a tooltip that appears when hovering over a setting related to folder upload limits. It informs the user that folders exceeding the specified size will not be uploaded.

usage.context:
: t("MaximumFileSize")
 }
 tooltipText={
 config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFoldersSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFilesSizeDescription")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizeDescription")
 : t("MaximumFileSizeDescription")
 }
